notes:
Ship Loadouts + crafting accuracy.

- NEW Ship Loadouts in Rock Break: build and save per-ship loadouts, mount crafted lasers, and get 'adjust your loadout / try this laser' advice when a rock won't crack.
- Crafted stats now match the in-game kiosk: multi-slot bonuses ADD, not multiply (a maxed Helix II reads +40%).
- Crafting rebuilt: one clean panel per slot with an average-quality fill bar; tap to mix qualities one at a time. Amounts read in SCU (4.278 SCU) like the game.
- Quality colours are now a smooth red-to-teal gradient.

Estimates stay labeled - the crack formula and combine rules are CIG's.
